MiniFW-AI Legal Demo — v2.2.0
==============================

See GUIDE.md for the full user guide:
  Docker setup, dashboard walkthrough, ransomware C2/privilege breach threat scenarios,
  configuration, admin reference, and troubleshooting.

Quick start:
  bash demo.sh
  open https://localhost:8448
  login: admin / Legal1!
  (accept the self-signed certificate warning)
  wait ~27 seconds for first events to appear
